channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs AirPods Pro 3: can Sony's newest earbuds beat Apple's best? Our full verdict is in
item.description: A new shape, superb sound quality, and some intriguing new features make the WF-1000XM6 a worthy contender for your iPhone’s audio — but can they better Apple's flagship buds?

item.title: Here’s Why Trump Posted About Iran ‘Stealing’ the 2020 Election Hours After the US Attacked
item.description: Donald Trump’s post on Truth Social about Iran echoed a conspiracy theory that has been circulating online for years.

item.title: Skateboarding train game Denshattack! is out on June 17
item.description: Denshattack!, the skateboarding game that manages to mix an anime-inspired narrative with Tony Hawk Pro Skater-style grinding and wall-riding, is coming out on June 17. The game's publisher Fireshine Games announced its launch date alongside a new trailer at Nintendo's recent Indie World event.If it wasn't clear from previous trailers, Denshattack! remains stylish as hell, filled to the brim with bright colors and over-the-top animation. The new trailer doesn't offer much more in terms of what the story of the game will be, but it does highlight its fast-paced gameplay, which will have you fli...

item.title: ‘Pokémon Pokopia’ Shows Why Switch 2 Games Need to Stop Fearing Mouse Controls
item.description: 'Pokopia' is the game that the Pokémon series—and every other Switch 2 game—can learn from.

item.title: The best AirPods deals you can get right now
item.description: If you know where to look, you can often score deals on Apple’s ever-expanding AirPods lineup. Both the AirPods Max and AirPods 4 (with and without ANC) now consistently receive discounts, as do the newer AirPods Pro 3. And while more recent shopping events like Black Friday and Cyber Monday delivered some of the steepest […]

item.title: ‘Scream 7’ Tested a Different, More Audacious Ending
item.description: It involved Matthew Lillard's character, Stu, who plays a different role in the film now.

item.title: 'A human-chosen password doesn't stand a chance': OpenClaw has yet another major security flaw — here's what we know about "ClawJacked"
item.description: Don't leave your OpenClaw with an easy password, experts warn.

item.title: Drinkbox Studios' Blighted will be out for Switch 2 and PC this fall
item.description: During today's Nintendo Indie World presentation, we got a narrower time frame for when and where we'll be able to play the next project from Drinkbox Studios. The team announced that Blighted will be coming out in this fall for both the Nintendo Switch 2 and for PC. It’ll arrive on the same date for both platforms, but we don’t have any more specific timeline than the season.We first heard about Blighted during last year's Summer Games Fest. With past credits such as Guacamelee!, Guacamelee! 2 and Severed, the studio is now turning its eye toward a 3D Metroidvania-RPG. It may be a new directi...

item.title: Shark's new robot vacuum has a mopping feature I've never seen before — and it's not the only brand to level-up its mop setup
item.description: From UV lights to jukebox style mop dispensers, robo-mops are more advanced than ever.

item.title: Les données et les photos d’1,5 million d’ados français ont été partagées sur le dark web
item.description: Plus d’1,5 million de collégiens et lycéens français sont exposés à la suite d'une fuite massive d'informations chez l’Union nationale du sport scolaire (UNSS). Parmi les données diffusées sur le dark web, on trouve des photos d'identité.

item.title: Another Oracle outage is messing up US TikTok
item.description: The US version of TikTok is once again experiencing issues due to an Oracle outage, just a month after coming back online from a similar outage in February. The service disruption, impacting Oracle's Ashburn, Virginia data center, began early Tuesday afternoon, with Downdetector reports spiking around 1PM Eastern. TikTok USDS confirmed in a post on […]...

item.title: The HBO brand doesn’t deserve this
item.description: Once synonymous with premium television, HBO has been through endless cycles of brand dilution. Now it’s bracing for another merger. HBO Max might be getting a brand update. Again.

item.title: ChatGPT’s new GPT-5.3 Instant model will stop telling you to calm down
item.description: The company says the new model will reduce the "cringe" that's been annoying its users for months.

item.title: Downdetector and Speedtest have been sold for over $1 billion
item.description: The next time you check your internet speed or whether your favorite site is down, another company may be profiting. On Tuesday, Ziff Davis announced that it sold its Connectivity division, which includes Ookla's Speedtest and Downdetector, to Accenture. The deal is worth $1.2 billion in cash.According to Reuters, the deal will allow Ziff Davis to focus on its core brands, including IGN, Mashable and Everyday Health. Brand consolidation appears to be the name of the game, as the company recently laid off some of Eurogamer's most experienced editors and its entire video team. That followed a ro...

item.title: Highguard is shutting down this month
item.description: Another high-profile live-service game is shutting down soon after launch: this time it's the free-to-play squad shooter Highguard. Developer Wildlight Entertainment says that, even though Highguard reached 2 million players, the game will be shut down permanently on March 12th. That's less than two months after the game debuted on January 26th. "Despite the passion […]...

item.title: Shark’s latest robot vacuum hunts stains with UV light
item.description: The Shark PowerDetect UV Reveal is SharkNinja's latest robot vacuum and mop. A flagship model with a multifunctional dock that empties the dustbin and refills and washes its mop, the Reveal's signature feature is a UV light designed to "find" stains on your floors. It costs $1,299.99 and is available now. Combined with an RGB […]

item.title: Anduril aims at $60 billion valuation in new funding round
item.description: The funding round would come less than a year after Anduril's Series G, which closed in June with $2.5 billion against a $30 billion valuation.

item.title: Musical adventure game Mixtape will be ready to rock out on May 7
item.description: Time to dust off your boomboxes and your walkmans: musical coming-of-age game Mixtape is due out this spring. At its reveal, this next title from game developer Beethoven and Dinosaur was targeting a 2025 release, but as happens to the best laid plans, the game's arrival got pushed back. Today's trailer announced that the new launch date for the narrative- and music-focused adventure game is May 7, 2026. Despite the new date, Mixtape will still be coming to the usual array of current gaming platforms: Steam and the Epic Games Store, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S and the Nintendo Switch 2. Joh...

item.title: Les vidéos de guerre générées par l’IA doivent l’indiquer, annonce le réseau social X
item.description: Un utilisateur publiant sur X une vidéo de guerre générée avec un logiciel d’intelligence artificielle (IA) doit désormais l’indiquer clairement au risque d’être suspendu du programme de partage de revenus pendant 90 jours, puis indéfiniment en cas de récidive, a annoncé mardi le réseau social.

item.title: Claude Code rolls out a voice mode capability
item.description: Anthropic is stepping up its game in the AI coding space with the rollout of Voice Mode in Claude Code.

item.title: Megawatt charging is go — BYD tests 1,500kW network that can add 249 miles of EV range in just 5 minutes
item.description: BYD has been testing its megawatt EV charging network with some select owners in China — and it's a glimpse of the gas station-style charging to come.

item.title: 3 unmissable new Prime Video crime shows to stream in March 2026
item.description: Prime Video has some gripping, addictive crime shows coming your way in March.

item.title: Elgato's Stream Deck + XL adds a touch strip and dials to an already massive array of buttons
item.description: Elgato's Stream Deck helped popularize using a macro pad among aspiring livestreamers and regular desk jockeys, so it's only natural for the brand to continue to expand on its lineup. After announcing a suite of new Stream Deck devices last year, Elgato is kicking off 2026 with the Stream Deck + XL, a larger version of the already big Stream Deck XL, and a collection of new audio accessories that should help improve sound mixing in and out of livestreams.The Stream Deck + XL not only expands on the number of buttons on the regular Stream Deck XL (from 32 customizable buttons to 36 customizable...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, robot tondeuse Dreame A1 Pro et forfait La Poste Mobile 300 Go : les 3 meilleures promos du mardi 3 mars 2026
item.description: Ce mardi 3 mars 2026 réserve d’excellentes affaires pour optimiser son quotidien connecté.

item.title: Before the Original Returns, ‘Star Wars’ Is Bringing Back the Special Editions, Again
item.description: 'A New Hope,' 'The Empire Strikes Back,' and 'Return of the Jedi' are returning to Blu-ray later this year.

item.title: Seagate reveals Mozaic 4+, its highest-capacity hard drives ever, offering up to 44TB for the next generation of storage
item.description: Seagate says Mozaic 4+ customers can unlock 100 sq ft of space and 0.8 million kWh of annual energy savings per 1 exabyte.

item.title: How Taco Bell is becoming the Apple of fast food
item.description: With its third annual Live Mas LIVE, Taco Bell is turning its ‘product launch’ event into full-on variety show hosted by Vince Staples. Its an over-the-top brand moment that more companies should embrace. When Taco Bell CEO Sean Tresvant first joined the company as chief brand officer back in 2021, he saw a unique opportunity in the brand’s cultural potential. “Sports, entertainment, music, food…it was like the Beautiful Mind meme with the equations spinning,” he told me in 2024. “They just needed someone to put it on the wall.”...

item.title: The long-delayed The Division Resurgence hits iOS and Android on March 31
item.description:
Ubisoft is finally releasing The Division Resurgence on March 31 for both iOS and Android. This game was first announced all the way back in 2021 and has suffered from delays in recent years. This is a free-to-play mobile game set in the universe of The Division, complete with an MMO-style shared open world and both co-op and solo gameplay. It also features an original story that's set during the early days of the pandemic in NYC, making it a sequel to the first game but a prequel to the second one.
It's a third-person action RPG with PvP. The loop looks fairly similar to the mainline games. ...
